global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a distinctively curved beak. It features a bright yellow-orange plumage on the head and underparts, contrasting with black wings and tail. The bird's texture is smooth and glossy.

part_details.head: Bright yellow-orange, smooth and glossy, with a small, rounded shape.
part_details.beak: Long, slender, and slightly curved, dark in color.
part_details.wings: Black, elongated, with a glossy texture.
part_details.tail: Black, long, and narrow, with a smooth finish.
part_details.body: Slender and elongated, predominantly yellow-orange with a glossy sheen.

spatial_relations: The bright yellow-orange head transitions into the black wings.
The curved beak protrudes from the front of the head.
The black tail extends from the rear of the body.
